steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase "the second most commonly used password" signals that the blank should describe something widely adopted by many users.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The word needs to describe an approach to password selection that favors convenience, evidenced by millions using "password" as a password. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — ‘creative’: showing originality — contradicts the example; using "password" as your password is the opposite of creative. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘useful’: serving a practical purpose — does not explain why people adopt this approach en masse; both secure and insecure passwords can be useful. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘popular’: widely adopted by many people — fits: the example shows this approach is common, with "password" being the second most used password. ✓
  • Choice D — ‘complex’: complicated or intricate — directly contradicts the passage, which says this approach favors convenience and uses a simple, easily remembered word. ✗
That confirms C is correct.
